items.briefing:
A criminal group known as Silent Ransom is actively targeting law firms with extortion attacks, which is a reminder that professional services organisations in Australia should stay alert. Separately, a vulnerability in Check Point VPN software has been actively exploited by attackers since early May — if your organisation uses Check Point VPN, ensure it has been patched immediately. Microsoft systems were also reportedly compromised to deliver malware to users of AI tools Claude and Gemini, so treat unexpected prompts or file downloads from AI platforms with caution.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Check Point VPN, check with your IT team today to confirm the latest security patches have been applied.

featured.title: Check Point VPN Flaw Exploited Since Early May
featured.quote: Critical VPN vulnerability actively exploited by ransomware gang poses immediate threat to Australian businesses.
